name: code-extract
description: Automatically extract code blocks from agent conversation logs, classify by language, and save them as individual files.
intent_triggers: 從對話紀錄提取所有程式碼
幫我把 Agent 對話裡的程式碼存成檔案
自動偵測 code fence 語言並分類
組裝分散的程式碼片段成完整檔案
extract code snippets from the chat log
save all fenced code blocks to files
auto-detect language and name the extracted files
assemble scattered code pieces into a project
pull code from clipboard into snippets folder
generate individual files from markdown code blocks
幫我處理這份對話紀錄裡的程式碼

source.description: Conversation file path or clipboard indicator

auto_name.description: Auto infer file names from code content

prefix.description: File name prefix for extracted snippets

clipboard.description: Read from clipboard instead of file

examples.intent: 從對話檔提取所有程式碼到 snippets 目錄
僅提取 Python 與 TypeScript 程式碼
將分散片段組裝成完整專案
